给你一个二维整数数组 `points`，其中 `points[i] = [xi, yi]` 表示第 `i` 个点在笛卡尔平面上的坐标。

返回可以从 `points` 中任意选择四个不同点组成的梯形的数量。

**梯形** 是一种凸四边形，具有 **至少一对** 平行边。两条直线平行当且仅当它们的斜率相同。

**示例 1：**

**输入：** points = [[-3,2],[3,0],[2,3],[3,2],[2,-3]]

**输出：** 2

**解释：**

有两种不同方式选择四个点组成一个梯形：

- 点 `[-3,2], [2,3], [3,2], [2,-3]` 组成一个梯形。
- 点 `[2,3], [3,2], [3,0], [2,-3]` 组成另一个梯形。

**示例 2：**

**输入：** points = [[0,0],[1,0],[0,1],[2,1]]

**输出：** 1

**解释：**

只有一种方式可以组成一个梯形。

**提示：**

- `4 <= points.length <= 500`
- `–1000 <= xi, yi <= 1000`
- 所有点两两不同。

solve(Points) ->
    N = length(Points),
    if 
        N < 4 -> 0;
        true ->
            AllCombinations = combinations(4, Points),
            count_trapezoids(AllCombinations, 0)
    end.

combinations(0, _, Acc) -> Acc;
combinations(_, [], Acc) -> Acc;
combinations(K, [H|T], Acc) ->
    combinations(K-1, T, [[H | Comb] || Comb <- combinations(K-1, T, [[]])]) ++
    combinations(K, T, Acc).

combinations(K, List) ->
    combinations(K, List, []).

count_trapezoids([], Count) -> Count;
count_trapezoids([Quad|Rest], Count) ->
    case is_trapezoid(Quad) of
        true -> count_trapezoids(Rest, Count + 1);
        false -> count_trapezoids(Rest, Count)
    end.

is_trapezoid([P1, P2, P3, P4]) ->
    Slopes = [
        {slope(P1, P2), slope(P3, P4)},
        {slope(P1, P3), slope(P2, P4)},
        {slope(P1, P4), slope(P2, P3)}
    ],
    lists:any(fun({S1, S2}) -> 
        case {S1, S2} of
            {parallel, parallel} -> true;
            {parallel, _} -> true;
            {_, parallel} -> true;
            {S1, S2} when S1 =:= S2 -> true;
            _ -> false
        end
    end, Slopes).

slope([X1, Y1], [X2, Y2]) ->
    Dx = X2 - X1,
    Dy = Y2 - Y1,
    if
        Dx == 0 -> parallel;
        true -> Dy / Dx
    end.
```

                fun(J, InnerAcc) ->

                        I >= J -> InnerAcc;

solve(Points) ->
    N = length(Points),
    if 
        N < 4 -> 0;
        true ->
            Pairs = [{I, J} || I <- lists:seq(1, N), J <- lists:seq(I+1, N)],
            Slopes = lists:foldl(fun({I, J}, Acc) ->
                {X1, Y1} = {lists:nth(I, Points), lists:nth(J, Points)},
                {X1x, X1y} = {lists:nth(1, X1), lists:nth(2, X1)},
                {X2x, X2y} = {lists:nth(1, Y1), lists:nth(2, Y1)},
                if
                    X1x == X2x -> 
                        Slope = infinity,
                        dict:append(Slope, {I, J}, Acc);
                    true ->
                        Slope = (X2y - X1y) / (X2x - X1x),
                        dict:append(Slope, {I, J}, Acc)
                end
            end, dict:new(), Pairs),
            Groups = dict:to_list(Slopes),
            Count = lists:foldl(fun({_, PairsInGroup}, Acc) ->
                M = length(PairsInGroup),
                if 
                    M >= 2 ->
                        PairsSet = sets:from_list(PairsInGroup),
                        AllPoints = lists:foldl(fun({A, B}, S) ->
                            sets:add_element(A, sets:add_element(B, S))
                        end, sets:new(), PairsInGroup),
                        UniquePoints = sets:to_list(AllPoints),
                        K = length(UniquePoints),
                        if 
                            K >= 4 ->
                                Comb = combinations(UniquePoints, 4),
                                Valid = lists:filter(fun(Quad) ->
                                    [P1, P2, P3, P4] = Quad,
                                    has_parallel_sides([P1, P2, P3, P4], PairsSet)
                                end, Comb),
                                length(Valid) + Acc;
                            true ->
                                Acc
                        end;
                    true ->
                        Acc
                end
            end, 0, Groups),
            Count div 2

solve(Points) ->
    N = length(Points),
    if 
        N < 4 -> 0;
        true ->
            Count = count_trapezoids(Points, N),
            Count
    end.

count_trapezoids(Points, N) ->
    Lines = get_all_lines(Points),
    SlopeGroups = group_lines_by_slope(Lines),
    count_trapezoids_from_slope_groups(SlopeGroups).

get_all_lines(Points) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(I, Acc1) ->
            lists:foldl(
                fun(J, Acc2) ->
                    if 
                        I < J ->
                            {X1, Y1} = lists:nth(I, Points),
                            {X2, Y2} = lists:nth(J, Points),
                            Dx = X2 - X1,
                            Dy = Y2 - Y1,

                            NormDy = Dy div G,

                                true ->

                                    [Line | Acc2]
                            end;
                        true ->
                            Acc2
                    end
                end,
                Acc1,
                lists:seq(1, length(Points))
            )
        end,
        [],
        lists:seq(1, length(Points))
    ).

group_lines_by_slope(Lines) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun({Dx, Dy, I, J}, Acc) ->
            Key = {Dx, Dy},
            case lists:keyfind(Key, 1, Acc) of
                false ->
                    [{Key, [{I, J}]} | Acc];
                {Key, Pairs} ->
                    lists:keyreplace(Key, 1, Acc, {Key, [{I, J} | Pairs]})
            end
        end,
        [],
        Lines
    ).

count_trapezoids_from_slope_groups(SlopeGroups) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun({_Slope, Pairs}, Acc) ->
            K = length(Pairs),
            if 
                K >= 2 ->
                    Acc + K * (K - 1) div 2;
                true ->
                    Acc
            end
        end,
        0,
        SlopeGroups
    ) - count_duplicate_parallelograms(SlopeGroups).

count_duplicate_parallelograms(SlopeGroups) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun({_Slope, Pairs}, Acc) ->
            K = length(Pairs),
            if

                    PointPairs = lists:flatten(Pairs),

                            end

solve(Points) ->
    N = length(Points),
    if 
        N < 4 -> 0;
        true ->
            Count = 0,
            Combinations = lists:seq(0, N-1),
            AllQuads = comb(Combinations, 4),
            count_trapezoids(AllQuads, Points, 0)
    end.

count_trapezoids([], _, Acc) -> Acc;
count_trapezoids([Quad | Rest], Points, Acc) ->
    [P1, P2, P3, P4] = [lists:nth(I+1, Points) || I <- Quad],
    case is_trapezoid(P1, P2, P3, P4) of
        true -> count_trapezoids(Rest, Points, Acc + 1);
        false -> count_trapezoids(Rest, Points, Acc)
    end.

is_trapezoid(P1, P2, P3, P4) ->
    Points = [P1, P2, P3, P4],
    Lines = [{A, B} || A <- Points, B <- Points, A < B],
    Slopes = [{A, B, slope(A, B)} || {A, B} <- Lines],
    SlopeGroups = group_slopes(Slopes),
    has_parallel_pairs(SlopeGroups).

slope([X1, Y1], [X2, Y2]) ->
    Dx = X2 - X1,
    Dy = Y2 - Y1,
    if
        Dx == 0 -> infinity;
        true -> Dy / Dx
    end.

group_slopes(Slopes) ->
    Groups = lists:foldl(
        fun({A, B, S}, Acc) ->
            case lists:keyfind(S, 1, Acc) of
                false -> [{S, [{A, B}]} | Acc];
                {S, Pairs} -> 
                    NewPairs = [{A, B} | Pairs],
                    lists:keyreplace(S, 1, Acc, {S, NewPairs})
            end
        end,
        [],
        Slopes
    ),
    [Pairs || {_, Pairs} <- Groups, length(Pairs) >= 1].

has_parallel_pairs([]) -> false;
has_parallel_pairs([Pairs | Rest]) ->
    case length(Pairs) >= 2 of
        true -> 
            % Check if the pairs are non-overlapping (i.e., form a quadrilateral)
            [{A1, B1}, {A2, B2}] = lists:sublist(Pairs, 2),
            Points = lists:usort([A1, B1, A2, B2]),
            length(Points) == 4;
        false -> has_parallel_pairs(Rest)
    end.

comb(_, 0) -> [[]];
comb([], _) -> [];
comb([H | T], K) ->
    [[H | Comb] || Comb <- comb(T, K-1)] ++ comb(T, K).

solve(Points) ->
    N = length(Points),
    if 
        N < 4 -> 0;
        true ->
            Pairs = [{I, J} || I <- lists:seq(0, N-1), J <- lists:seq(I+1, N-1)],
            Slopes = lists:foldl(
                fun({I, J}, Acc) ->
                    {Xi, Yi} = {lists:nth(I+1, Points), lists:nth(J+1, Points)},
                    {X1, Y1} = {lists:nth(1, Xi), lists:nth(2, Xi)},
                    {X2, Y2} = {lists:nth(1, Yi), lists:nth(2, Yi)},
                    DX = X2 - X1,
                    DY = Y2 - Y1,
                    GCD = gcd(DX, DY),
                    ReducedDX = DX div GCD,
                    ReducedDY = DY div GCD,
                    if 
                        ReducedDX == 0 -> Slope = {0, 1};
                        ReducedDY == 0 -> Slope = {1, 0};
                        true -> Slope = {ReducedDX, ReducedDY}
                    end,
                    dict:append(Slope, {I, J}, Acc)
                end,
                dict:new(),
                Pairs
            ),
            Groups = dict:filter(fun(_, V) -> length(V) >= 2 end, Slopes),
            Count = lists:sum(
                lists:map(
                    fun({_, PairsList}) ->
                        K = length(PairsList),
                        K * (K - 1) div 2
                    end,
                    dict:to_list(Groups)
                )
            ),
            % Now, subtract the number of parallelograms (which are counted as trapezoids but have two pairs of parallel sides)
            Parallelograms = lists:sum(
                lists:map(
                    fun({_, PairsList}) ->
                        K = length(PairsList),
                        K * (K - 1) div 2
                    end,

                )
            ),
            % Also, subtract the number of collinear quadruples (which are not convex)
            % But this is more complex and not handled here for simplicity
            Count - Parallelograms
    end.

gcd(A, B) when A == 0 -> abs(B);
gcd(A, B) when B == 0 -> abs(A);
gcd(A, B) -> gcd(B, A rem B).

    % Generate all possible pairs of sides and check for at least one pair of parallel sides

**梯形** 是一种凸四边形，具有 **至少一对** 平行边。两条直线平行当且仅当它们的斜率相同。

**示例 1：**

**输入：** points = [[-3,2],[3,0],[2,3],[3,2],[2,-3]]

**输出：** 2

**解释：**

有两种不同方式选择四个点组成一个梯形：

- 点 `[-3,2], [2,3], [3,2], [2,-3]` 组成一个梯形。
- 点 `[2,3], [3,2], [3,0], [2,-3]` 组成另一个梯形。

**示例 2：**

**输入：** points = [[0,0],[1,0],[0,1],[2,1]]

**输出：** 1

**解释：**

只有一种方式可以组成一个梯形。

**提示：**

- `4 <= points.length <= 500`
- `–1000 <= xi, yi <= 1000`
- 所有点两两不同。

solve(Points) ->
    N = length(Points),
    if 
        N < 4 -> 0;
        true ->
            AllCombinations = combinations(4, Points),
            count_trapezoids(AllCombinations, 0)
    end.

count_trapezoids([], Count) -> Count;
count_trapezoids([Quad|Rest], Count) ->
    case is_trapezoid(Quad) of
        true -> count_trapezoids(Rest, Count + 1);
        false -> count_trapezoids(Rest, Count)
    end.

is_trapezoid([P1, P2, P3, P4]) ->
    Slopes = [
        {slope(P1, P2), slope(P3, P4)},
        {slope(P1, P3), slope(P2, P4)},
        {slope(P1, P4), slope(P2, P3)}
    ],
    lists:any(fun({S1, S2}) -> 
        case {S1, S2} of
            {parallel, parallel} -> true;
            {parallel, _} -> true;
            {_, parallel} -> true;
            {S1, S2} when S1 =:= S2 -> true;
            _ -> false
        end
    end, Slopes).

slope([X1, Y1], [X2, Y2]) ->
    Dx = X2 - X1,
    Dy = Y2 - Y1,
    if
        Dx == 0 -> parallel;
        true -> Dy / Dx
    end.

combinations(0, _) -> [[]];
combinations(_, []) -> [];
combinations(K, [H|T]) ->
    [[H|C] || C <- combinations(K-1, T)] ++ combinations(K, T).
```

solve(Points) ->
    N = length(Points),
    if N < 4 -> 0;
       true ->
            AllSlopes = get_all_slopes(Points),
            count_trapezoids(AllSlopes)
    end.

get_all_slopes(Points) ->
    N = length(Points),
    lists:foldl(fun(I, Acc) ->
        lists:foldl(fun(J, InnerAcc) ->
            if I < J ->
                P1 = lists:nth(I, Points),
                P2 = lists:nth(J, Points),
                {X1, Y1} = {lists:nth(1, P1), lists:nth(2, P1)},
                {X2, Y2} = {lists:nth(1, P2), lists:nth(2, P2)},
                Slope = case X1 == X2 of
                    true -> infinity;
                    false -> (Y2 - Y1) / (X2 - X1)
                end,
                dict:append(Slope, {I, J}, InnerAcc);
            true -> InnerAcc
            end
        end, Acc, lists:seq(1, N))
    end, dict:new(), lists:seq(1, N)).

count_trapezoids(AllSlopes) ->
    SlopesList = dict:to_list(AllSlopes),
    lists:foldl(fun({_Slope, Pairs}, Acc) ->
        case length(Pairs) >= 2 of
            true ->
                PairsList = lists:sort(Pairs),
                count_combinations(PairsList, Acc);
            false -> Acc
        end
    end, 0, SlopesList).

count_combinations(PairsList, Acc) ->
    N = length(PairsList),
    lists:foldl(fun(I, Sum) ->
        lists:foldl(fun(J, InnerSum) ->
            if I < J ->
                {A, B} = lists:nth(I, PairsList),
                {C, D} = lists:nth(J, PairsList),
                case (A /= C) and (A /= D) and (B /= C) and (B /= D) of
                    true -> InnerSum + 1;
                    false -> InnerSum
                end;
            true -> InnerSum
            end
        end, Sum, lists:seq(1, N))
    end, Acc, lists:seq(1, N)).
